## ⚠️ SECURITY REPORT - PLEASE READ FIRST

**DO NOT open a public security issue.**

If you've found a security vulnerability, please report it privately using one of these methods:

1. **Email:** [hello@sandstre.am](mailto:hello@sandstre.am)
2. **GitHub Security Advisory:** Use the [Report a vulnerability](https://github.com/sandstream/kit/security/advisories/new) button
3. **See:** [SECURITY.md](https://github.com/sandstream/kit/blob/main/SECURITY.md) for full details

## About This Template

This template is for **non-critical security concerns** that don't require embargoed disclosure, such as:
- Security improvement suggestions
- General hardening recommendations
- Documentation about security practices

**Critical vulnerabilities:** Please use the private reporting methods above.

---

- [ ] Vulnerability (use private reporting)
- [ ] Security improvement suggestion

## Severity Assessment
<!-- How serious is this? -->
- [ ] Low (minor issue, no immediate impact)
- [ ] Medium (moderate impact or exploitability)
- [ ] High (significant impact)
- [ ] Critical (use private reporting instead)

## Details
<!-- Detailed explanation of the issue -->

## Impact
<!-- What could an attacker or malicious user do? -->

<!-- Suggested fix or mitigation -->

## Related Information
<!-- Links to CVEs, security advisories, or references -->

<!-- Optional: minimal code demonstrating the issue (if safe to share publicly) -->

```
Code here
```

## Checklist
- [ ] I've read [SECURITY.md](https://github.com/sandstream/kit/blob/main/SECURITY.md)
- [ ] This is not a critical vulnerability (those should use private reporting)
- [ ] I haven't disclosed this publicly elsewhere
- [ ] I'm not including sensitive information that shouldn't be public
